Root cause: confirmed — the payment-webhook consumer's retry storm overwhelmed
the shared Redis instance, which is why both checkout and notifications failed.
The notifications path uses the same Redis, so its failure is fully explained by
the same root cause; no separate investigation needed. Evidence: Redis CPU at
94% at 14:07 (metric link: redis-cpu-panel). Closing both incident tracks as a
single confirmed root cause. Confidence: high.
